phrases: Hi! I'm Ambar, your RVSolutions Plus assistant. How can I help you?
I can guide you about Roberto's web development services and consulting

scheduling_response: Sure! I'd be happy to help you schedule a consultation. Please fill out the form below so I can add you to the calendar.
error_response: Sorry, an error occurred while processing your question. Please try again later.
success_response: Thank you {{name}}! Your consultation request for {{date}} at {{time}} has been sent. I'll contact you by email soon to confirm the appointment.
error_consult: Sorry, there was an error sending your request. Please try again or contact us directly at: rvargas@rv-solutions.net
select_date_time: Please select a date and time for your consultation.
placeholder: Ask me about services, projects or technology...
